extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João attacked with 6km to go on Monte Bondone, THOMAS Geraint bridged at 4.5km and both distanced ROGLIČ by 25 seconds to take pink.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma controlled with Hague/Conrad in break (4:30 down) but UAE-Emirates trio Formula/Vine/Almeida proved superior firepower final climb.
Thomas bridged Almeida's 6km attack at 4.5km rather than countering, converting to collaboration that gapped Roglič 30 seconds mid-climb.
Sepp Kuss survival to 6km mark proved critical insurance for Roglič, limiting damage to 25 seconds after 30-second deficit.
Dunbar emerged from satellite break strategy to fifth GC, demonstrating Jay co-Alco positioning value on 5500m stages.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: bridged aggressively at 4.5km and sustained collaboration rather than attacking Almeida, taking pink at 36 years old
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: initiated decisive move 6km out and held Thomas collaboration to first Grand Tour stage win
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: gapped 30 seconds mid-climb and required Kuss survival to limit final damage to 25 seconds
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: survived break selection and climbed to fifth GC, 303 seconds back from Thomas
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: struggled on pace when Vine finished work, losing contact with GC group
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: lasted to 6km mark providing critical insurance that prevented Roglič losing more than 25 seconds
